generated_assessment.reasoning: This profile is highly conventional (Openness 15th pct) and tough-minded (Tender-Mindedness 5th pct), which, combined with lower trust (Agreeableness Trust 6th pct), fosters skepticism of international commitments perceived as costly or entangling. However, the moderate dutifulness (60th pct) and stability (low Neuroticism) introduce a pragmatic willingness to honor existing obligations, resulting in a mild leaning toward opposition rather than categorical rejection.
